---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

::: {.grid .about-grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 #about-sidebar}

![](assets/images/about-profile.JPEG){.about-photo}

## Risyad Abiyyu Siregar {.about-name}

Jakarta, Indonesia

<div class="about-links">
<a href="mailto:abiyyusiregar@gmail.com" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Email</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/abiyyusiregar/" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
<a href="https://github.com/rasiregar" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
</div>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8 #about-main}

To live a dignified life. This has been my life motto for so long. I am on a mission to achieve that vision, for me and for everyone around.

Medical doctor and global health professional with experience spanning clinical medicine, research, and international health policy. Experienced in synthesising complex scientific evidence into clear policy-relevant insights for international health programmes, technical advisory processes, and decision-makers.

---

<details>
<summary>**Education**</summary>
<div>

**Imperial College London**

*Master of Public Health (MPH)*

Distinction · LPDP Scholar · Faculty of Medicine Dean's Prize · Joint Best Dissertation Award

---

**Universitas Indonesia**

*Doctor of Medicine (dr.)*

Cum laude

</div>
</details>

<details>
<summary>**Experience**</summary>
<div>

**Oxford University Clinical Research Unit Indonesia**
Scientific and Technical Officer · June 2025 – present

**World Health Organization**
Intern, One Health & NTD Programme · December 2024 – May 2025

**Evidence Based Health Policy Center, IMERI FKUI**
Research Associate · August 2024 – May 2025

**Baa General Hospital, Rote Ndao Regency**
General Practitioner · August 2022 – August 2023

**CEEBM, Cipto Mangunkusumo Hospital**
Research Intern · January 2022 – July 2022

</div>
</details>

<details>
<summary>**Publications**</summary>
<div>

[Report of the eighteenth meeting of the Strategic and Technical Advisory Group for Neglected Tropical Diseases](https://www.who.int/publications/i/item/9789240112285)
*WHO Global NTD Programme · August 2025*

---

[WHO guidelines for the treatment of patients with cystic echinococcosis](https://www.who.int/publications/i/item/9789240110472)
*WHO Global NTD Programme · June 2025*

---

[The effectiveness of comprehensive geriatric assessment intervention for older people in outpatient setting: a systematic review/meta-analysis](https://doi.org/10.1186/s12877-025-06048-8)
*BMC Geriatrics · July 2025*

---

Indonesia Diabetes Diagnosis, Treatment, and Control: Trends, Challenges, and Socioeconomic Influences (2013–2022)
*Preprints for The Lancet: Diabetes and Endocrinology · October 2024 · awaiting peer review*

---

Evaluating Indonesia's Health Service Delivery: A Qualitative Study Using the WHO Health System Performance Assessment Framework
*Presented at EHMA Conference, Rennes, France · June 2025*

</div>
</details>

:::

:::
